name: Luck Spells
description:
Spell modules tied to the reworked luck system.

These modules make luck-control spells more practical and more reliable while preserving their original tactical identity.

## Included Spell Changes

* **Fortune and Misfortune Independent Luck** — reworks Fortune and Misfortune into stronger luck-control spells with reduced mana costs. **Fortune** increases Luck and protects affected units from ordinary Luck penalties. Luck-reducing artifacts and effects cannot bring affected units below Fortune's minimum positive Luck result, although Hourglass of the Evil Hour can still suppress positive Luck entirely. **Misfortune** decreases Luck and prevents ordinary Luck bonuses from raising affected units above its maximum negative Luck result. Luck-boosting artifacts and effects cannot raise affected units above Misfortune's negative cap. The spells remain direct counters to each other.
author: bew_
